description_long: This teapot features a spherical body divided into three distinct color bands: a greenish top, a white central band, and a dark metallic lower section. The teapot stands on a small, round pedestal base that matches the green color of the lid. Its spout is elegantly curved and white, while the handle is black, angular, and attached at two points to the body, giving it a modern, geometric look. The lid is domed with a spherical knob, fitting snugly atop the teapot. The overall design is both functional and decorative, with a striking contrast between the glossy green, matte white, and metallic black surfaces.
description: A spherical teapot with a green domed lid, white midsection, and black metallic base, featuring a curved white spout and angular black handle. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green domed lid, white spout, and angular black handle, with the teapot's full pedestal base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the teapot's round profile, the domed lid, and the layered color bands, with the spout and handle less prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle and the pedestal base, with the spout mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle and spout from a different angle, emphasizing the teapot's symmetry and color contrast.
attribute_spout_orientation: Curved, angled slightly upward, positioned at the front of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: Angular, geometric black handle attached at two points, moderately thick with a modern style.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed with a spherical knob, fits snugly.
